target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Visible evidence shows extensive facade destruction, multiple floors with missing windows and structural elements, and debris at ground level; damage appears to cover more than 45% of the visible target area but less than 75%, consistent with severe damage per doctrinal definitions.

target_1.brief_supporting_logic: Building shows extensive structural collapse with roof and upper floors missing; debris field at base; visible fire and smoke; consistent with 75-100% damage per doctrinal definition for framed buildings.

summary: Two buildings are assessed: one with SEVERE DAMAGE (PROBABLE confidence) showing extensive facade destruction and debris, and another DESTROYED (CONFIRMED confidence) with collapsed roof and upper floors, visible fire, and a large debris field. The overall scene depicts a heavily damaged urban area with multiple buildings suffering catastrophic structural failure, widespread debris, and active fire and smoke, indicating a significant loss of functional capacity and likely rendering the area uninhabitable or unusable.
